name: Crock Pot Choucroute
recipeIngredient: 5 slices Canadian bacon, cut into strips
1/2 lb turkey kielbasa, cut into 6 pieces
1 lb small new red potatoes, quartered
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the shredded cabbage, shredded carrot, drained sauerkraut, apple cider, brown sugar, caraway seeds, and ground allspice in a slow cooker.
2. Place the Canadian bacon evenly on top of the sauerkraut mixture.
3. Arrange the kielbasa pieces over the bacon.
4. Add the quartered potatoes around the kielbasa.
5. Cover the slow cooker and cook on low for 7 hours, or until the potatoes are tender.
